name: Savory Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole, cook the sliced carrots and chopped onion with 1 tablespoon of water on high power for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in the ground beef and continue cooking uncovered on high power for 3 minutes, stirring once to break up the meat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the tomato sauce, remaining 1/2 cup of water, dry red wine, sugar, salt, garlic powder, and pepper.
4. Continue cooking uncovered on high power for an additional 4 to 5 minutes or until the mixture is heated through and vegetables are tender.
5. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese and serve.
